items.title: UnitedHealth (UNH) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
items.description: Shares of health insurance company UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after its board of directors authorized the payment of a quarterly cash dividend, signaling a commitment to shareholder returns. The healthcare and insurance provider's board authorized a quarterly cash dividend of $2.21 per share. This represents an annualized yield of around 3.3%, which is notably high for the company.
